versions.title: Provider-Agnostic Client
versions.subtitle: One Interface, Any Provider
versions.keyInsight: MEAI's IChatClient lets you swap LLM providers by changing config, not code.

versions.title: Middleware Pipeline
versions.subtitle: Stack Behavior Like Onion Layers
versions.keyInsight: Middleware composes cross-cutting concerns (logging, caching, telemetry) around the chat client.

versions.title: Agent Loop
versions.subtitle: One Agent = One ChatClientAgent
versions.keyInsight: MAF's ChatClientAgent wraps IChatClient into a full agent with sessions and streaming.

versions.title: Tool Use
versions.subtitle: Functions Become Tools Automatically
versions.keyInsight: AIFunctionFactory.Create() generates JSON schemas from C# method signatures automatically.

functions.name: GetCurrentTime
functions.signature: static string GetCurrentTime()

versions.title: Permission
versions.subtitle: Ask Before You Act
versions.keyInsight: Wrap any tool with ApprovalRequiredAIFunction to gate dangerous operations through human approval.

versions.title: Hooks
versions.subtitle: Middleware Is the New Hook Bus
versions.keyInsight: DelegatingChatClient middleware replaces hook buses with composable, testable decorators.

versions.title: Planning
versions.subtitle: An Agent Without a Plan Drifts
versions.keyInsight: Explicit plans via AIFunction tools keep long-running work visible and correctable.

versions.title: Agent-as-Tool
versions.subtitle: Agents Compose Like Functions
versions.keyInsight: Any agent can become a tool for another agent, enabling hierarchical composition.

versions.title: Skill Loading
versions.subtitle: Load Knowledge on Demand
versions.keyInsight: Inject skill names in the system prompt; load full content only when the model requests it.

versions.title: Context Compaction
versions.subtitle: Context Will Fill Up
versions.keyInsight: MessageCountingChatReducer and SummarizingChatReducer keep context windows manageable automatically.

versions.title: System Prompt
versions.subtitle: Assembled at Runtime, Never Hardcoded
versions.keyInsight: The system prompt is a generated product of context, tools, and environment state.

versions.title: Error Recovery
versions.subtitle: Errors Are the Start of a Retry
versions.keyInsight: DelegatingChatClient middleware handles retries with exponential backoff and fallback models.

versions.subtitle: Graphs Beat Flat Loops

versions.title: A2A Protocol
versions.subtitle: Agents Talk to Agents
versions.keyInsight: The A2A protocol standardizes how agents discover and communicate with each other.

versions.subtitle: External Tools, Standard Protocol
